characters.name: Tomás
characters.role: Father; former civil technician turned freelance repairman
characters.voice_tone: Low, careful, practical, with pauses when emotions surface
characters.goal: Keep his daughters safe while deciding whether to report what they find
characters.fear: Losing another family member because he hesitated or chose wrong
characters.arc: From protective avoidance to collaborative trust; learns that safety includes truth-telling
characters.visual_notes: Early-40s, weathered jacket, oil-stained hands, tired eyes, old wedding band on cord around neck

characters.name: Clara
characters.role: Older daughter; analytical observer and map-keeper
characters.voice_tone: Sharp, precise, dry humor under stress
characters.goal: Decode the symbols and prove the forest damage is intentional
characters.fear: Being dismissed as dramatic or childish when she is actually right
characters.arc: From proving herself alone to accepting help and sharing leadership
characters.visual_notes: Teen, notebook always in hand, practical boots, patched backpack with hand-drawn map pins

characters.name: Lia
characters.voice_tone: Soft, metaphor-rich, playful then suddenly direct
characters.goal: Make sense of the whispers and keep the family together
characters.fear: That adults will ignore what she senses until it is too late
characters.arc: From underestimated dreamer to emotional compass of the group
characters.visual_notes: Child, oversized sweater, chalk in pocket, ribbon bracelet made from trail twine

characters.name: Inês Rocha
characters.role: Retired park ranger and local memory-keeper
characters.goal: Protect the forest's legal boundaries and pass on what she knows
characters.fear: Dying before she can stop one last theft of the land
characters.arc: From guarded outsider to mentor who entrusts evidence to the family
characters.visual_notes: Late-60s, faded ranger cap, binoculars with cracked strap, cane carved with contour lines

characters.name: Mateus
characters.role: Contract driver/mechanic tied to the extraction network
characters.voice_tone: Friendly surface, evasive specifics, clipped when cornered
characters.goal: Finish the contract and stay invisible to regulators
characters.fear: Becoming the scapegoat if the operation is exposed
characters.arc: From ambiguous helper to reluctant witness when faced with family danger
characters.visual_notes: 30s, reflective work vest, mud-caked pickup, keyring with anonymous numbered tags
